case_title: KLISMITH CAROLYN VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $180.00 FILED BY KLISMITH CAROLYN AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES SAN FRANCISCO WATER DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
